videos.title: Agents vs Chatbots: Codex Changes Everything #aiagents #codex #automation
videos.description:
Watch the full conversation with Tibo, who leads Codex at OpenAI, live on Substack now. Link in bio.

What's the real difference between a chatbot that answers questions and an AI agent that can perform actions? This video shares the inside scoop on why powerful artificial intelligence, like Codex, meets the bar for an agent. We explore how these ai tools are changing the landscape of automation, moving beyond simple Q&A to executing complex tasks.

videos.title: GPT-5.5 vs 1000 Piece Lego Set #ai #challenge
videos.description:
Watch the full conversation with Tibo, who leads Codex at OpenAI, exclusively on Substack. Link in bio.

What's really happening when AI models like GPT-5.5 attempt complex creative tasks? 

This video explores the current ai limits of artificial intelligence in designing custom set Lego sets. We discuss how these ai models perform, revealing an interesting ai evaluation of their capabilities in handling intricate designs.
